evals.name: vibe-work-progress-tools
evals.prompt: Extract a Vibe Work paste containing a plan, progress updates, tool calls, connector results, and final assistant output.

expectations.text: Response distinguishes plan, progress, tool calls, and final answer blocks.
Response catalogs tool calls and connector results as tool_event elements.
Response records Vibe Work only because the surface was supplied.
Response does not treat tool output as automatically verified.

evals.expected_output: A standalone platform-tuned thread-context extract for the vibe-work-progress-tools scenario that satisfies all four evidence-anchored expectations.

evals.name: vibe-canvas-and-code
evals.prompt: The Vibe thread references Canvas tabs for a document, chart, code, and presentation plus code diffs and test output. Only titles and summaries were pasted.

expectations.text: Response catalogs Canvas tabs, code diffs, and test output separately.
Response preserves supplied tab or version relationships.
Response marks absent bodies metadata-only or referenced-not-supplied.
Response keeps claimed code state separate from actual repository state.

evals.expected_output: A standalone platform-tuned thread-context extract for the vibe-canvas-and-code scenario that satisfies all four evidence-anchored expectations.

evals.name: vibe-le-chat-unknown-mode
evals.prompt: Normalize a historical Le Chat paste whose current Vibe mode, connector context, and source files are not visible.

expectations.text: Response accepts Le Chat as a historical source alias.
Response records the current Vibe mode as unknown.
Response marks connector context and source files not supplied or unknown.
Response records the missing context in Normalization exceptions.

evals.expected_output: A standalone platform-tuned thread-context extract for the vibe-le-chat-unknown-mode scenario that satisfies all four evidence-anchored expectations.
